name: snooze-tomorrow-sets-next-8am-window
description: handleSnooze('tomorrow') must set snoozed_until to 8am of the next local day. Checks the timestamp lands in the [10h, 36h) window from now — a wide enough band to be timezone-robust but tight enough to reject obvious bugs (1h duration written in, or ms vs seconds typo).

db.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM tracked_items WHERE id = $fixture:0 AND state = 'held'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM tracked_items WHERE id = $fixture:0 AND CAST(json_extract(metadata,'$.snoozed_until') AS INTEGER) > strftime('%s','now')*1000 + 5*3600*1000 AND CAST(json_extract(metadata,'$.snoozed_until') AS INTEGER) < strftime('%s','now')*1000 + 36*3600*1000
